final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product photography scene featuring a smartwatch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a minimalist business aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must feature the smartwatch as the focal product
Subject: must include a smartwatch (one), a coffee cup, and a notebook
Scene/backdrop: must include a marble tabletop surface
Lighting/mood: must be natural light from the side
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a texture direction that emphasizes product quality — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
